extortion.description: The company SWISS CZ s.r.o. is a 100% subsidiary of SWISS spol. s .r.o. Bratislava, which is part of the multinational ELKO GROUP network with a total annual turnover of more than 2.2 billion USD. We obtained about 15Gb of their data and will upload it soon.
